items.text:
It obviously requires a great deal
of work and care
to arrange all this.
To what end is all this done?

I face the challenges
they've put before me,

and I don't do too badly,
if I may say.

Is this a test?
Do I win recognition if I pass?

Is it a kind of training,
to make me stronger at solving problems?

Is it merely a show of great construction,
like the monuments
of forgotten civilizations?

They left no direction
as to my purpose here.
Why not?
